title: crataegus crus-galli prunellifolia
intro: Crataegus crus-galli prunellifolia, also known as the Chinese hawthorn, is a species of hawthorn tree native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. The medicinal properties of Crataegus crus-galli prunellifolia include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiotonic properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, and include improving cardiovascular health, lowering blood pressure, and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Crataegus crus-galli prunellifolia include tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as hypertension, heart failure, and arrhythmias.
